title: Necromancy
body:
# **Minecraft necromancy mod!**
this mod adds a new set of tools and armor + crafting recipes for all spawn eggs and the spawner.

This is a mod i made a while back to create more game post-netherite and spawner/spawn egg recipes to create an easier way to progress in other mods by makeing more advanced mob farms.

the textures of the items are just the mcreator textures and the recipes are viewable by looking at this mod page. 

When you craft a necronomicon it is **one** use

the dragon spawn egg, the dragon egg and the wither spawn egg unobtainable by recipe at the moment. The spawn eggs that aren't there are crafted with 8 of their primary drop

endercite is only obtainable with a netherite pickaxe

![Necronomicon recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed6bef9d9555cd42d600bd836b36cbca6acdec03.png)
